creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to leftfoot from comment #6)

no stack trace because unwind library not available

sdx.pro/workdir/CxxObject/editeng/source/editeng/eehtml.o] Error 4

no stack trace because unwind library not available

no stack trace because unwind library not available

See <http://gcc.gnu.org/bugs.html> for instructions


Signal 9 is SIGKILL.  I wonder if you are running out of memory the OOM killer is the culprit.

This port can go kind of crazy with the number of parallel jobs that it runs.  It's something that I want to look into.  In the meantime, try
    make MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER=1 ...
